title: Student Course Transfers
description: Coursework completed at external institutions for which students have been awarded credit at the home institution.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student course transfer.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student who received credit for the transferred course from an external institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

equivalentCourse.title: Equivalent Course
equivalentCourse.description: The home institution course equivalent to the course at the external institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Equivalent Course.

transferredFrom.title: Transferred From
transferredFrom.description: The external institution where the course was originally completed.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Transferred From.

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The academic level (for example, 'Under Graduate' or 'Graduate') associated with the transferred course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

academicProgram.title: Academic Program
academicProgram.description: The academic program to which the transferred course has been applied.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Program.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic period assigned to the transferred course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

awardGradeScheme.title: Award Grade Scheme
awardGradeScheme.description: The grade scheme that was used to award a grade to the transferred course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Award Grade Scheme.

grade.title: Grade
grade.description: A unit of measurement of how well a student completed a course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Grade.

qualityPoints.title: Quality Points
qualityPoints.description: A value, based on the grade awarded, that represents the student's performance at the external institution that may be used to determine a student's overall performance.

credit.title: Credit
credit.description: The unit specification that was awarded to the transferred course.

creditCategory.title: Credit Category
creditCategory.description: The category of credit associated with the transferred course.

creditType.title: Credit Type
creditType.description: The higher-level category of academic credits.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The institutionally defined credit category assigned to the transferred course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

measure.title: Measure
measure.description: A unit or standard of measurement for the credit.

awardedCredit.title: Awarded Credit
awardedCredit.description: The credit awarded for the transferred course.

equivalencyAppliedOn.title: Equivalency Applied On
equivalencyAppliedOn.description: The date when the equivalency was officially applied to the student's record at the home institution.
